name: Low-Fat Pineapple Yam Bake (Health Valley) (o
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook yams in boiling water for 25-35 minutes or until very soft and tender. Drain and mash thoroughly until consistency is smooth.
2. Preheat oven to 400°F.
3. Mix drained pineapple and 4 tablespoons of maple syrup into mashed yams.
4. Spoon the mixture into a 9-inch round or 8-inch square non-stick baking pan.
5. Beat egg whites to soft peaks; add remaining 1 tablespoon of maple syrup and beat until stiff.
6. Spread whipped egg white mixture with a spatula, using a swirling motion, on top of yam mixture.
7. Bake at 400°F for 8 to 10 minutes, or until the top is golden.
